name: What if no witnesses to my fall at work in Farmington Utah?
description: Yes, medical + report enough; on-site presumed work-related[1].

mainEntity.name: What if no witnesses to my fall at work in Farmington Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical + report enough; on-site presumed work-related[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Still claimable—your report, medical, premises presumption suffice.** Utah shifts burden if on-site[1]. **Key factors:** Photos/video, maintenance logs help. **Practical guidance:** Report immediately, note conditions, get doctor confirm. Witnesses not required. **Many solo claims succeed.**
